room.caption: [G6-WaterB] This part was added on as part of the revamp of this Gate.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(58)
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh15MainA) mapScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh15SideA)
var tempMplay; if global.bossTrack=0 {tempMplay=findMusic(605)} else if global.bossTrack=1 //Boss Fight: High Heels Girl { viewFix=instance_create(320,176,oMisc) viewFix.type=0 viewFix.sprite_index=sNull view_object[0]=viewFix tempMplay=findMusic(819) oPlayer1.x=256; oPlayer1.y=288 var boss,enemyBarrier; boss=instance_create(384,288,oPT_HighHeelsGirl) boss.activateBoss=1 enemyBarrier=instance_create(144,128,oEnemyBarrier); enemyBarrier.image_yscale=10 enemyBarrier=instance_create(480,128,oEnemyBarrier); enemyBarrier.image_yscale=10 }
playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode:
type=1 sprite_index=sHHG_Idle image_speed=0 image_xscale=-1
if global.gameProgress>=3570 or global.bossTrack=1 {instance_destroy()}
